news.t: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware US Aggregate Bond ETF (EAGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US dollar-denominated bonds from issuers evaluated for favorable ESG practices. EAGG was launched on Oct 18, 2018 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg MSCI US Aggregate ESG Focus

data.title: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
data.text: Investors are rapidly moving toward investing with environmental, social and corporate-governance (ESG) qualities in mind.
